zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Ryder於大約1650年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德時，她的父親Thomas Ryder32歲，母親Mary30歲。她於1670年12月1日與Caleb Curtice在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1711年9月4日在她的家鄉享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Ryder于大约1650年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德时，她的父亲Thomas Ryder32岁，母亲Mary30岁。她于1670年12月1日与Caleb Curtice在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1711年9月4日在她的家乡享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ryder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rider  .
Americanized and Flemish form of Dutch Rijder: occupational name for a mounted warrior or messenger, Middle Dutch rider ‘horseman, rider’.

variants.name: Rider
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English ridere ‘horseman’, perhaps with a specific application such as ‘forest ranger’, ‘horseman who guards crops’, or ‘mounted warrior, knight’. Compare Knight .
English: habitational name from Ryther, near Selby (Yorkshire), probably from Old English ryther ‘clearing’.

English: topographic name from Middle English ridere ‘dweller at a clearing’ (see Reeder ) or ‘dweller by a small stream’, depending on which sense of Middle English ride the surname is derived from. These topographic senses of Rider are limited to the southern counties of England (especially Surrey, Sussex, and Hampshire), where topographic names in -er and the Middle English words ride ‘clearing’ and rithe ‘small stream’ are mainly found. See also Reed .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.description: After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Ryder was born about 1650, in Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Thomas Ryder, was 32 and her mother, Mary, was 30. She married Caleb Curtice on 1 December 1670, in Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 4 September 1711, in her hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Ryder est née environ 1650, à Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Ryder, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Caleb Curtice le 1 décembre 1670, à Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 septembre 1711, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ryder è nata il circa 1650 nel Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Thomas Ryder, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mary, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Caleb Curtice il 1 dicembre 1670, nel Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 settembre 1711, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ryderが約1650年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニースフォルクソウソルドで生まれた時，父Thomas Ryderは32歳，母Maryは30歳であった。1670年12月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニースフォルクソウソルドでCaleb Curticeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1711年9月4日に故郷で62歳で死去した。

ko.Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드
ko.Southold, Suffolk, New York, British Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ryder(이)가 대략 1650년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Ryder(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1670년 12월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드에서 Caleb Curtice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1711년 9월 4일 그녀의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ryder nasceu aproximadamente 1650, em Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Ryder, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Caleb Curtice em 1 de dezembro de 1670, em Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de setembro de 1711, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos.

ru.Southold, Suffolk, New York, British Col: соутолд, суффолк, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Ryder родилась около 1650 г. в местности соутолд, суффолк, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Thomas Ryder было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mary, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Caleb Curtice 1 декабря 1670 г. в местности соутолд, суффолк, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 4 сентября 1711 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Ryder nació aproximadamente 1650, en Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Ryder, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Caleb Curtice el 1 de diciembre de 1670, en Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de septiembre de 1711, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años.
